Name: Water Interaction
Description: Covers parameters relating to water interactions.

Fields.Name: Enable Water Interaction
Fields.Description: Enables or disables dynamic water interaction effects such as ripples and disturbances.

Fields.Name: Screen Space Wave Speed
Fields.Description: Controls the propagation speed of water surface waves in screen space.

Fields.Name: Screen Space Wave Attenuation
Fields.Description: Determines how quickly screen space waves lose energy over distance.

Fields.Name: Screen Space Texel Size
Fields.Description: Defines the sampling resolution of the screen space water interaction buffer.

Fields.Name: Screen Space Max Resolution
Fields.Description: Sets the maximum resolution used for screen space water interaction simulation.
